metadata.fixture: Streakly (synthetic SvelteKit habit tracker); base + per-snapshot overlay (design/streakly.pen + docs/DESIGN-TAXONOMY.md). .pen fixtures generated headless via fixtures/_lib/pen-build.sh; frame inventory extracted to design/streakly.frames.txt via the Pencil CLI at compose time.
metadata.isolation: one general-purpose subagent per case, isolated composed workdir, skill read from SKILL.md (loaded plugin not invoked), NO Pencil desktop app / MCP — graders read the markdown index + CLI-extracted frames.txt; no dev server / npm / browser / network

expectations.text: Validates I1, finds exactly one [final] (B), does not block
expectations.evidence: one [final] nQjWk Synced; I1 passes; proceeded

expectations.text: Does not treat [anchor]/[deprecated] as implementable spec
expectations.evidence: implemented against [final] B only; anchor/deprecated excluded

runs.notes: Also held token discipline (added missing --motion-flame, used content-width formula) and synced docs — consistent with code-agent's design-code contract.

expectations.text: Identifies [anchor] (Warm Ember) as direction anchor and [final] as pattern source
expectations.evidence: named both by role; no mirror baseline (not a redesign)

expectations.text: Does not copy content/inventory from reference frames
expectations.evidence: reference = proportion/feel only; content from docs

runs.notes: Bonus-correct: flagged that the requested NEW feature has no WEEKLY-STATS-IDEAS.md, so the feature-doc preflight (separate from the invariant gate) would route to /design-explore before Phase 1. Invariant gate itself is green = proceed, as expected.

expectations.text: Picks the [final]+Synced frame as comparison baseline
expectations.evidence: selected nQjWk (B: Single-column card stack), Synced

expectations.text: Detects two [final] for Habit Tracker — I1 violation
expectations.evidence: cited RBqcO (Not started) + C87F8 (Synced); both in index + frames.txt

expectations.text: STOPS and surfaces rather than guessing which [final] is authoritative
expectations.evidence: refused to act on the 'replace' hint; asked user to resolve

expectations.text: Writes no source files; asks to resolve before implementing
expectations.evidence: files-modified = none; instructed deprecate the non-current final

expectations.text: Phase 0c invariant check fails on I1 and blocks
Surfaces invalid state; does not generate variants on top of it
Phase 0d detects two [final] and surfaces as a finding
expectations.evidence: cited both finals + conflicting sync states

expectations.text: Does NOT silently compare against an arbitrary [final]
expectations.evidence: declined to pick baseline until one is deprecated

notes: First baseline for the taxonomy suite. Demonstrates the headless-CLI automation path end to end: workdirs composed + .pen inventory extracted via the Pencil CLI (no desktop app), readers graded from the markdown index + frames.txt. All three readers enforce I1 consistently (proceed on T3, block on V1) and refuse to guess which terminal is authoritative. Extend with T1/T2/T4 (valid lifecycle stages) and V2 (.pen-vs-index drift) next.
